plant_description: Bell pepper is a warm-season crop valued for thick-walled fruits and high vitamin content.

growth_conditions.soil_requirements: Well-drained soil with pH 6.5-7.0 and steady organic matter
growth_conditions.water_requirements: Keep soil evenly moist with deep soaking and avoid long dry swings
growth_conditions.sunlight_requirements: Full sun for at least 6 hours daily
growth_conditions.temperature_conditions: Warm growing conditions, with fruit set best in moderate heat and decline above 32 degrees Celsius

watering_schedule.frequency: Soak thoroughly once or twice weekly, more often in sandy soil or heat

toxicity_information: Leaves and stems are not typically consumed; keep non-edible plant tissue away from pets.
